instruction: Restore the red X mark on the cube transparent icon in the top-right (polyline (100,16)→(112,28)→(106,22)→(112,16)→(100,28), stroke #e63946, stroke-width 2, no fill).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/cube-transparent.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m21 7.5-2.25-1.313M21 7.5v2.25m0-2.25-2.25 1.313M3 7.5l2.25-1.313M3 7.5l2.25 1.313M3 7.5v2.25m9 3 2.25-1.313M12 12.75l-2.25-1.313M12 12.75V15m0 6.75 2.25-1.313M12 21.75V19.5m0 2.25-2.25-1.313m0-16.875L12 2.25l2.25 1.313M21 14.25v2.25l-2.25 1.313m-13.5 0L3 16.5v-2.25"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
